title: Paper State Snapshot: FA4 B200 White-Box Runtime Predictor
summary: Snapshot of paper-line state before drafting the FlashAttention-4 B200 white-box runtime predictor manuscript.

selected_hypothesis.one_sentence: Adding occupancy, effective HBM/L2/TMA bandwidth, and precision-specific throughput terms to the FlashAttention-4 roofline produces an analytical B200 runtime predictor that beats the roofline baseline by more than 5 percentage points MAPE.

paper_target.audience: systems and machine-learning researchers and kernel engineers interested in white-box GPU performance modeling
paper_target.contribution_claim: A white-box analytical model for FlashAttention-4 runtime on NVIDIA B200 that identifies dominant bottlenecks without launching the kernel, with accuracy competitive with the accepted roofline baseline.
